narrative:
Precinct Fultonham (precinct in Muskingum County) has 594 registered voters, with 59.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.3%, a clear Republican lean of 7.9 percentage points.
